Off Calendar Dec-01-2025 Continued To Mar-02-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear and Order to Show Cause will be issued to Kurt Huysentruyt (former administrator) to appear on March 2, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to show cause as to why sanctions in the amount of $250.00 should not be imposed against him for failure to appear. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Cece. Not reported.
